subcodes.first_line: Say: O Beloved of the world and He Who is mentioned by the Most Great Name! I beseech Thee to ordain for Thy handmaidens that which will attract them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی یا محبوب العالم و المذکور بالاسم الاعظم اسئلک بان تقدر لامائک ما یجذبهن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
